# OSubscription

Observe existing OCI OSubscription subscription summaries from Kubernetes with a query-backed, controller-backed read-only contract.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Package | `osubsubscription` |
| Support Status | Preview |
| Latest Released Version | `Not yet released` |
| Install Namespace | `oci-service-operator-osubsubscription-system` |
| Controller Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-osubsubscription:<version>` |
| Bundle Image Pattern | `ghcr.io/<REPOSITORY_OWNER>/oci-service-operator-osubsubscription-bundle:<version>` |
| Setup Guide | [Open guide](../../../installation.md) |

## Notes

- Current package scope is intentionally limited to Subscription and publishes only a query-backed observe-only contract.
- The reviewed runtime uses ListSubscriptions only, requires compartmentId plus exactly one of planNumber, subscriptionId, or buyerEmail, and surfaces xOneGatewaySubscriptionId plus xOneOriginRegion when request-scoped access headers are needed.
- The top-level SubscriptionSummary does not expose a tracked OCI identity, so the runtime accepts only a unique list match and intentionally leaves `status.status.ocid` empty.
- No checked-in release manifest currently lists this package; the resource scope below reflects the current repository package metadata.
- This package is currently hidden from the Supported Resources landing page until a checked-in release manifest promotes it to the customer-visible surface.
